title: Pungent Norwegian Uni Gratin
description: A pungent, crumbly post-workout dish featuring uni and pickled fennel, perfect for a high-protein meal after a workout.

ingredients.name: Pickle slices
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of sweet and dill pickle

ingredients.name: Pickled fennel
ingredients.notes: Slice and chop fennel, then marinate in vinegar and spices

ingredients.name: Chopped parsley
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried parsley is fine

ingredients.name: Dill
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried dill is fine

instructions: In a food processor, blend cottage cheese until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine cottage cheese, sour cream, paprika, salt, black pepper, crushed red pepper, and nutmeg. Mix well.
Add the chopped parsley and dill to the bowl and mix until combined.
In a separate bowl, mix the pickle slices and pickled fennel.
In a greased 8-inch (20cm) square baking dish, create a layer of cottage cheese mixture. Top with a layer of uni, then a layer of pickle mixture, and finally a layer of panko breadcrumbs.
Drizzle the top with olive oil and melted butter.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cottage cheese mixture on top.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
